description: This file defines SCSS mixins and functions for handling responsive breakpoints and media queries, including calculations for min/max widths, infix strings, and media query mixins for different viewport sizes.

methods.name: breakpoint-next
methods.description: Returns the next breakpoint name after the given breakpoint, based on the ordered list of breakpoint names.

methods.name: breakpoint-min
methods.description: Returns the minimum width for a given breakpoint, or null if it is the smallest.

methods.name: breakpoint-max
methods.description: Returns the maximum width for a given breakpoint, reduced by 0.02px to account for fractional widths.

methods.name: breakpoint-infix
methods.description: Returns a string with a dash prefix for breakpoints other than the smallest, used for utility class naming.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-up
methods.description: Creates a media query applying styles for the given breakpoint and larger viewports.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-down
methods.description: Creates a media query applying styles for the given breakpoint and smaller viewports.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-between
methods.description: Creates a media query spanning between two breakpoints.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-only
methods.description: Creates a media query applying styles only within a specific breakpoint range.
